settings.heading: FEATURES
settings.content:
The fragrance refill is made from high-quality PE material, which slowly and evenly releases the aroma into the environment.


Ensures long-lasting and consistent scent intensity – without sudden changes or overly strong fragrance at the start.


Lasts up to 3 weeks, depending on usage frequency and ambient temperature.


High heat resistance – perfect for use in cars during both summer and winter.

settings.heading: SAFETY INFORMATION
settings.content:
PECAUTIONS: keep away from vontact with textiles and other surfaces toprevent staining. If oil gets on other surfaces. wipe it immediately. Do not use on body or clothing. Keep away from pets. The manufacturer shall not beliable for any damage that may occur due to incorrect use of the product. Fragrance notes: Sandwood, Almonds, Coffee. CAUTION: H317 May cause an allergic skin reaction. H319 Causes serious eye irration. H412 Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rising. If skin irration or rash occurs: Get medical advice/attention. Avoid release to the environment. Dipose of contents/ container to in accordance with local/regional/national/international regulation.

Ingredients:

linalool, 7-hydroxycitronellal, coumarin, tetramethylacetyloctahydronaphthalene, geraniol, 2-methyl-4-(2-methylpropyl)-benzenepropanal, nerol, 2,4-dimethylcyclohex-3-ene-1-carbaldehyde, isoeugenol, alpha-hexylcinnamaldehyde, scented canary oil (3-(p-cumenyl)-2-methylpropionaldehyde), 3,7-dimethyloctan-3-ol, methyl 2,4-dihydroxy-3,6-dimethylbenzoate, 3-hexylmethylcarbonate, delta-damascone, beta-damascone.

May cause an allergic reaction.

settings.heading: HOW TO USE
settings.content:
Remove the fragrance capsule from the pouch and insert it into the car air freshener holder designed for air vent installation.

Control the fragrance intensity through your car’s air vents – simply adjust the temperature and airflow to achieve your desired scent level.

settings.heading: SHIPPING
settings.content:
Estimated delivery times within the European Union:

  • Baltics: 1–3 business days
  • Central Europe: 3–6 business days
  • Rest of EU: 4–8 business days

Delivery times may vary slightly depending on your location.

settings.text: FREYERI premium car diffuser refill designed for a clean, fresh, and long-lasting scent. This car air freshener diffuser effectively eliminates odors while delivering a consistent fragrance experience. Easy to use and compatible with most car diffuser systems, it keeps your car interior smelling modern, fresh, and inviting every day.

Sandalwood adds a warm, creamy, and smooth woody base that enhances depth and longevity in a fragrance. It creates a soft, luxurious foundation, bringing balance, warmth, and a calming, refined character to the overall composition.

Almond adds a soft, nutty sweetness with a slightly creamy and gourmand nuance that enriches the fragrance. It smooths sharper notes, enhances warmth, and creates a comforting, inviting, and subtly indulgent scent profile.

Coffee beans introduce a rich, deep, and slightly bitter roasted intensity that adds bold character and depth to a fragrance. This note enhances warmth, increases longevity, and creates a strong, modern, and addictive scent experience.

settings.title: Our fragrances
settings.description: Buy 4 Refill Parfumes and Pay for only 3
